question_text: Compare the advantages and disadvantages of using solar energy instead of coal for electricity generation. Name at least one advantage and one disadvantage.
correct_answer: Advantages: renewable, doesn't produce pollution/greenhouse gases, no fuel costs. Disadvantages: depends on weather/sunlight, expensive initial setup, requires large areas, doesn't work at night
explanation: Solar energy is sustainable and clean, but it is intermittent (unreliable) and has high upfront costs. Coal is reliable and cheap to run, but it is non-renewable and produces greenhouse gases. A good answer balances both perspectives.
